notes: v390 — 🤖 Auto-pilot: you can now set Buys per day (max) up to 6. The dropdown in ⚖ My Rules → ⚙ Advanced bot settings used to stop at 3; it now goes to 6, so the bot can open up to 6 new practice positions in a single day. It's still bounded by your max total positions and your $-per-buy, so it never overspends. Pick your number and press 💾 Save my rules. Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
